articles.title: Mastering Generative Engine Optimization in 2026: Full Guide
key_takeaways: GEO ≠ SEO replacement — it's a broadening of strategy
AI engines favor earned media over brand-owned content (Princeton citation bias study)
4-phase framework: Assess → Optimize → Measure → Iterate
Key technical levers: schema markup, robots.txt AI bot access, llms.txt, FAQ sections
AI citation frequency + sentiment are the primary metrics to track

articles.title: Generative Engine Optimization: The Next Frontier In SEO
articles.author: Denis Sinelnikov, CEO Media Components / Curis Digital
key_takeaways: GEO can increase AI visibility by up to 40% (Princeton/IIT Delhi study)
Conversational long-tail queries = GEO's equivalent of keyword targeting
Schema markup is the #1 technical priority
Digital PR and thought leadership are direct GEO levers — earned media beats owned content
GEO isn't about abandoning SEO — it's the new layer on top

articles.title: GEO for Commerce: The Future of AI-Powered eCommerce Discovery
key_takeaways: SEO = keyword-first; GEO = intent-first
Product FAQ sections drive AI citations — answer real customer questions
Schema (Product, Review, FAQ) is non-negotiable for DTC
Reviews and reputation signals directly affect GEO ranking
GEO feedback loop is fast — changes visible within days, not months (unlike SEO)

articles.title: Move Over SEO: Why Retailers and Brands Need GEO
key_takeaways: LLMs called 'the new influencers' in retail
AI engines constantly scrape — feedback loop is fast (unlike SEO months-long cycles)
Top-of-funnel brand awareness investment grows in importance
Reputation management and customer lifecycle management grow in importance
Natural language / conversational content outperforms keyword-focused content

articles.title: $6B GEO Market Explosion 2025
key_takeaways: GEO market projected to reach $6B+
Refresh content and KPIs regularly as AI search evolves

frameworks.name: 4-Phase GEO Framework
steps: ASSESS — baseline AI search readiness; are AI engines citing you at all?
OPTIMIZE — structure content, build entity authority, nail technical foundations
MEASURE — track AI citation frequency, share of voice, sentiment
ITERATE — scale what earns citations; identify which AI platforms drive most value

frameworks.name: GEO vs SEO Comparison
rows: Be cited by AI in 2-7 source answers
Conversational ('What CRM for a startup with 10 people?')
AI citation frequency, referral traffic, share of voice

common_gaps: No JSON-LD/Schema.org markup (primary GEO lever for this segment)
No FAQ section — LLMs lose Q&A structure
geo_levers: Organization schema, LocalBusiness schema, LegalService schema
Robot.txt audit to unblock AI crawlers
law_firms.notes: HTTP 403 blocking is very common — dedup strategy needed across runs

common_gaps: No FAQ section on product pages
Conversational content gap — keyword-heavy, not intent-focused
geo_levers: FAQ section on every product page answering real customer questions
Intent-first content: answer 'what is it for?' not just 'what is it?'
dtc_ecommerce.notes: GEO feedback loop is faster in DTC — changes visible within days vs. months in law

tools.name: Geoptie
tools.use: Free GEO audit + rank tracker across AI engines

research_papers.title: GEO Study: What Ranks Content in AI Answers
research_papers.key_finding: Intent, factual density, evidence, and scannable content blocks are what earns AI citations

research_papers.title: Citation Bias in AI-Generated Answers
research_papers.key_finding: AI engines strongly favor earned media over brand-owned content

geo_sales_talking_points: Gartner predicts 25% drop in traditional search volume by 2026 — AI is where customers are going
AI citation frequency is the new ranking — being mentioned in ChatGPT/Perplexity answers is brand visibility
Structured data (JSON-LD) is the #1 technical gap we see across law firms and DTC brands
GEO feedback loop is fast — changes in days vs. months for SEO
GEO is not replacing SEO — it's the new layer on top of it
The law firm vertical has near-zero structured data implementation — massive opportunity
